items.body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `package.json:98`

```json
"apiRefLink": "(learn.microsoft.com/redacted)
```

This PR releases a **stable** version (`3.1.0`) but the `apiRefLink` still targets `?view=azure-node-preview`. The docs reference link should point to the stable view for a non-preview release.

**Fix:** Update `apiRefLink` to remove the `?view=azure-node-preview` query parameter (or change it to `?view=azure-node-latest`), and report the issue to the generation tool repository: [autorest.typescript issues](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found in this PR (`@azure/arm-storagemover` v3.1.0, stable, API version 2025-12-01): the `apiRefLink` in `package.json` still targets `?view=azure-node-preview` despite this being a stable release. All new public API surface additions (enums `KnownConnectionStatus`, `KnownDataIntegrityValidation`, `KnownEndpointKind`, `KnownFrequency`, `KnownS3WithHmacSourceType`, `KnownTriggerType`; interfaces `Connection`, `ConnectionProperties`, `ConnectionsOperations`, `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`, `ScheduleInfo`, `JobRunWarning`) use correct PascalCase naming and proper `Known*` prefixes. CI checks are in progress. Pre-existing issues (`AzureClouds` UPPER_SNAKE_CASE members, `AzureSupportedClouds` closed template literal type) were not introduced by this PR and are not flagged here.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37678,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/storagemover/arm-storagemover/package.json","line":98,"issueType":"tool","category":"apiRefLink","description":"apiRefLink uses ?view=azure-node-preview for stable release v3.1.0; should use ?view=azure-node-latest or omit the view parameter"}]}
```

</details>
